questions.stem: Which of the following best describes the role of health psychology in understanding health behaviors?
options: It focuses solely on the biological aspects of health.
It examines how psychological factors influence health and illness.
It is primarily concerned with the treatment of physical diseases.
It disregards the impact of lifestyle choices on health.
questions.answer: It examines how psychological factors influence health and illness.
questions.explanation: Health psychology investigates the interplay between psychological factors and health, making this option correct. The other options either misrepresent the scope of health psychology or focus too narrowly on biological or treatment aspects.
questions.kn_explanation: This KN code applies as it relates to understanding health behaviors and the psychological factors influencing them.
questions.quality_comment: The question effectively assesses knowledge of health psychology's role.
questions.suggestedParagraph: ## Why Classical Conditioning Interventions Matter for Your Career
questions.lessonExcerpt: Understanding these techniques will give you practical tools for treating anxiety disorders, phobias, PTSD, and addictive behaviors.
